Package org.eventb.ui

Interface IStatusChangedListener

All Known Implementing Classes:
AxiomMasterSection, CarrierSetMasterSection, ConstantMasterSection, EventBTreePartWithButtons, EventMasterSection, InvariantMasterSection, SyntheticContextViewSection, SyntheticMachineViewSection, VariableMasterSection
public interface IStatusChangedListener
Common protocol for listening to changes of the Event-B editor.
Since:
3.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    statusChanged(IRodinElement element)
    Called when the status (saved/unsaved) of an element has changed.

  • Method Details

    • statusChanged

      void statusChanged(IRodinElement element)
      Called when the status (saved/unsaved) of an element has changed.

      This method is called for each new elements that gets created in the editor, and called again when the edited file is saved to notify that the elements is no longer new.

      Parameters:
      element - the element which made the saved/unsaved status change
